title: Freddie plugin.json manifest
description: Optional manifest sitting alongside a plugin's plugin.js/handler.js. Describes the plugin for discovery/marketplace tooling -- freddie itself only reads the feature_flag field (src/host/host.js isFlagDisabled) at load-gate time; every other field here is descriptive metadata consumed by validatePluginManifest()/plugin-install-cli/plugin-certification-badges.

name.description: Plugin directory name / registration name, kebab-case.

capabilities.description: Which PI_VERBS/GUI_VERBS (src/host/contract.js) this plugin registers against.

dependencies.description: Other freddie plugin names this plugin's register() calls host.get()/requires on. Distinct from the real plugin.js 'requires' array (that one is load-order-enforced by topoSort at boot); this is descriptive-only for marketplace/install tooling.

safety_rating.description: Mechanically-derived badge tier (see plugin-certification-badges row) -- never a hand-asserted claim; install/validate tooling recomputes this from real checks.

feature_flag.description: Name checked against src/flags.js isFlagEnabled() at discovery time (src/host/host.js isFlagDisabled) -- the ONE field freddie's own loader reads. Absent means no gate.

registry_url.description: Optional self-hostable static JSON index URL this plugin's updates can be fetched from (see plugin-registry-backend-design row).
